description_long: This is a square, white pillow with a subtle vertical pinstripe pattern on its fabric surface. The pillow appears to be made of a soft, cotton exterior and is likely filled with a lightweight, compressible material such as polyester fiber or down. Both the front and back faces are smooth and slightly puffed, with gentle creases and rounded corners, giving it a plush and inviting appearance. A dark, flower-shaped brand logo with white text is visible in the upper left corner on the front and upper right on the back, adding a distinct visual element. The edges are neatly stitched, and the overall form is well-maintained, suggesting it is new or well-cared for. The pillow is shown isolated against a plain background, with no visible tags or additional labels.
description: A square, white pillow with a subtle pinstripe pattern and a dark brand logo in the corner, featuring a soft, plush appearance and neatly stitched edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white pillow's pinstripe pattern and a prominent dark brand logo in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the logo partially visible at the top edge, emphasizing its puffed, soft profile.
description_view_2: Back view of the pillow, similar to the front but with the brand logo now in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's thickness and the logo at the top edge, mirroring view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: dark flower-shaped logo with white text in the upper left (front) and upper right (back) corners
